errors.streamIdle: The model stopped responding mid-stream. Try again or pick a different model.
errors.streamTimeout: The model did not finish within the maximum allowed run time.

categories.transient: Transient failure — another attempt should succeed.
categories.degraded: Running in degraded mode — the model switched to a fallback provider.
categories.permanent: Persistent failure — try a different model or contact support.

voiceError.engine_unavailable: The selected speech-to-text engine is unavailable.
voiceError.engine_failed: The speech-to-text engine crashed during decoding.
voiceError.audio_decode_failed: Could not decode the captured audio — please retry.

errors.too_large: File is too large (5 MB max).
errors.total_too_large: Attachments exceed the 20 MB aggregate cap.
errors.invalid_base64: File content could not be encoded.
errors.magic_mismatch: File content does not match its declared type.
errors.size_mismatch: Declared size does not match file content.
errors.permission_denied: Permission denied — enable it in system settings.
errors.extraction_failed: The document could not be parsed.

codes.idle_timeout: The model sent no response within the allowed window. It may be too heavy for your hardware, overloaded, or require authentication.
codes.total_timeout: The model didn't finish within the maximum time budget (3 minutes).
codes.auth: The provider rejected the authentication. If you use an Ollama Cloud model, run 'ollama signin' in a terminal.
codes.model_not_found: The requested model isn't installed. Run 'ollama pull <model>' or pick another one in the settings.
codes.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during generation.

character.title: Character
character.name: Name
character.comingSoonMessage: Character management is being reworked. In the meantime, characters keep being managed from OpenClaw.

voice.title: Voice
voice.vadThresholdHint: Higher = less sensitive. 0.5 is a reasonable starting point.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.primaryHueHint: Shifts the accent color around the color wheel.

connection.title: Connection
connection.serverUrlHint: Leave empty to use the current page's origin.

llm.title: Language model
llm.thinkingHint: Not wired server-side yet — the value is stored but has no effect for now.
llm.applyHint: Writes the selection to openclaw.json and restarts the gateway. Changing the dropdown alone has no effect until you click Apply.

animation.title: AI animation
animation.classifierHint: Enables a small on-device AI model (~66 MB, downloaded once) that infers emotion from the reply text and animates the avatar — useful when the character does not use emotion markers.

errors.invalid_card: Invalid card — no Character Card v3 metadata detected.
errors.unsupported_spec: Unsupported card version (v2 and v3 only).
errors.card_too_large: File is too large (10 MB max).
errors.empty_prompt: The card has no usable content for the system prompt.
errors.malformed_json: Corrupted JSON — the card could not be parsed.

warnings.lorebook_deferred: Lorebook imported but not yet active.

errors.workspace_empty: Nothing to capture — IDENTITY.md or SOUL.md is missing from the workspace.
errors.invalid_persona: Unreadable persona — missing '# Name' heading or empty prompt.
errors.no_workspace_configured: Capture disabled — no OpenClaw:WorkspacePath configured on the server.

audio.title: Voice
audio.vadThresholdHint: Higher = less sensitive. 0.5 is a reasonable starting point.

engine.label: Transcription engine
engine.hint: Pick a downloaded model to use it. Whisper handles French and Romance languages noticeably better at the cost of more CPU/RAM; Parakeet wins on latency.

vad.title: Mic sensitivity
vad.thresholdHint: Higher = less sensitive. 0.5 is a reasonable starting point. If the mic triggers on background noise, raise this.
vad.negativeThresholdHint: Lower = closes more easily once you stop talking. Must stay below the detection threshold.
vad.redemptionHint: Trailing silence required to close the phrase. Longer = long sentences OK; shorter = snappier.
vad.disabledInPtt: Not used in push-to-talk mode: you control the recording window manually.

mic.title: Microphone
mic.label: Input device
mic.hint: Pick which mic to use. Reused on PC and mobile builds.
mic.permissionHint: Grant mic access to see your devices (click "Test microphone" below).

inputMode.title: Input mode
inputMode.label: How Seren listens
inputMode.vadHint: The mic stays open and auto-detects the start and end of each phrase.
inputMode.pttHint: Hold the mic button to speak, release to send. Best in noisy environments.

filters.label: Audio filters (browser)
filters.hint: Handled by the browser — effectiveness varies by OS.

language.label: Transcription language
language.hint: Forcing a language gives noticeably better results on Romance languages. Auto lets Whisper guess.

errors.deleteLastBlocked: At least one model must remain downloaded.
